name: Slap Dragon (Funky Americana Bluegrass)
description: Slap Dragon is the brain-child of bassist Scott Mulvahill and vocalist Laura Berens who met and began writing songs together in the summer of 2023. Soul vocals and acoustic instruments (played by some of Nashvilles heaviest session musicians) combine for a fresh, funky irresistibly joyful sound that is equal parts bluegrass, disco, and RnB. Slap Dragon played their first show on June 1st, 2024 to an enthusiastic crowd in Nashville, followed by a set at Bonnaroo. Slap Dragon has begun gaining traction online including a recent Instagram clip of Already Won surpassing 260k views. Following their successful Kickstarter campaign in October 2025, Slap Dragon is set to release their anticipated debut album, Mission Statement, in 2026.

name: The Narcotix, The Cradle, Alex Koi x Kirin McElwain
Lemony | Old Tom & The Lookouts | Darlin'
Myles Weinstein presents Unlimited Myles
description: From behind the desk to behind the drums Known in the jazz industry as a leading booking agent and manager, Myles Weinstein returns to his roots as a musician by assembling a stellar group of artists for this one-time-only gig. The band will include Sean Jones, Steve Wilson, Billy Childs, Matt Penman and Alicia Olatuja.
